description: Capitale de la culture nawabi, Lucknow est réputée pour son raffinement, ses monuments moghols-awadhi et sa cuisine halal légendaire (kebabs, biryani).

description_en: Lucknow, in India, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.5/5. Muslim travelers will find 4 halal restaurants, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
